instruction:
An integer $n$ is fixed with respect to $m$ if $n$ and $n^2$ leave the same remainder when divided by $m.$ Let $M$ be the largest integer such that $1000$ is fixed with respect to $M.$ Find the number of positive integer divisors of $M.$

Options:
A. 129
B. 130
C. 122
D. 119
E. 112
F. 121
G. 120
H. 128
I. 126
J. 124
